strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship background with TypeScript/Node.js
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin experience; Java exposure appears dated (robotic arms work circa 2016-2018)
React experience present but not deeply highlighted; Vitest not explicitly mentioned

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience at current role
Missing Nest.js and limited recent Kotlin/Java

response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years, strong craftsmanship values (TDD, pairing, trunk-based), and directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. The TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/Docker stack aligns well, and architecture/scalability experience is evident from high-throughput work at Sociomantic and pricing systems at Optilyz. Gaps around Nest.js and recent Kotlin are real but learnable for a senior of this caliber.
